title: xyris arenicola
intro: Xyris arenicola, also known as the sand-baillonia or the beach baillonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Its health benefits include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Herbal preparations of Xyris arenicola can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
